backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a product catalog with admin-gated CRUD operations and Stripe payment integration (checkout session creation and status retrieval) using access control and HTTP outcalls.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single feature (restoring dark/near-black background color scheme) to its relevant files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the build plan.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the page title 'AIron - Automatic Ironing Machine' that mounts the React app via a root div and module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that creates a TanStack Router instance from the route tree and renders it via RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shared layout component providing a fixed dark header with desktop nav links, a mobile hamburger drawer, logout functionality, and an Outlet for child routes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an optional admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook providing Internet Identity authentication state (identity, login, clear, status flags) backed by the DFINITY AuthClient with idle handling disabled by default.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching user roles, admin status, Stripe configuration, and creating checkout sessions via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines a permanent dark premium theme with custom OKLCH color tokens and utility component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Multi-step checkout page (contact → payment method → confirm) with a simulated payment flow that navigates to a success or failure page.
frontend/src/pages/FeaturesPage.tsx: Product features page displaying AIron machine specs, feature cards, and a quantity selector that navigates to the checkout page.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity authentication that redirects authenticated users to the product page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Payment failure page showing an error message, common failure reasons, and buttons to retry checkout or return to the features page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Displays a post-payment success page confirming the AIron order, showing next steps (email confirmation, shipping, delivery) and a product summary with navigation back to the product page.
frontend/src/pages/ProductLandingPage.ts: Hero landing page for the AIron product featuring a full-screen background image, headline, pricing (₹20,000), and a three-card feature highlights grid with navigation to the features and checkout pages.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the TanStack Router route tree for the app, mapping paths (/, /product, /features, /checkout, /payment-success, /payment-failure) to their respective page components under a shared Layout root.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom oklch-based color palettes (gold, silver, charcoal), serif/sans font families, custom shadows, and animation keyframes, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata (version 13) describing the AIron multi-page Indian-market product website, its architectural decisions, existing implemented features, and known issues for build planning continuity.
